name: Serial Killer Sim
description: That drunkard? Your classmate? Co-worker? A rich lady you met at the bar? The son of a famous mafia leader? Anyone who looked at you wrong? Your family? Friends? There's no limit. But… some things will lead to one another. Be careful not to bite more than than you can swallow. And… don't forget to dispose the body.
creator: ChunkyMeatPies
